name: Swedish Potato Pancakes
recipeInstructions:
1. Add 1/4 cup milk to eggs. Blend in flour.
2. Add remaining milk, sugar, salt, and pepper. Beat until smooth.
3. Let stand 2 hours.
4. Squeeze grated potatoes dry and add to batter.
5. Heat griddle and grease lightly.
6. Use 1/4 cup batter for each pancake.
7. Fold pancakes in quarters.
8. Serve with lingonberries.
Makes 14 to 16 pancakes.
